title: Discord hint from Ethanol — finding PID/UID offsets in IDA rodata
html:
Discord/Slack hint from "Ethanol" (TA or peer) walking Yahir through finding the PID offset in IDA: double-click push offset aProcU_o, jump to .rodata (offset 00171AA6, address 081B9AA6). Used in the May 19/20 busybox reverse-engineering homework.

ida pro · busybox · reverse engineering · cs coursework · ethanol
